ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: (IsPickVal (PriorValue (StageName),"Closed Won") || IsPickVal (PriorValue (StageName),"Closed Lost") ) &&ISCHANGED(StageName) && ($Profile.Name != "System Administrator" ) && ($Profile.Name !="SW SalesOps Extended" ) && ($Profile.Name != "SW SalesOps" ) && RecordType.DeveloperName<>"Wolves"
ValidationRule.errorMessage: In order to Re-Open Closed Won/Lost Opportunities please contact Sales Ops.
